title: Crispy Korean Crisp Dates Bowl
description: A sweet, crispy solo dinner bowl featuring stoned dates, boiled to perfection, and dash-friendly for a quick Korean-inspired snack.
instructions: Boil 100ml water in a small pot until it reaches a gentle boil.
Add 150g stoned dates to the boiling water and simmer for 3 minutes until soft.
Remove from heat and let cool for 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix 15ml rice vinegar, 10g honey, and 5ml sesame oil.
Add the cooled dates to the vinegar-honey-sesame oil mixture and stir gently.
Let the bowl sit for 1 minute to allow the dates to absorb the dressing.
Serve immediately for a crispy, sweet, dash-friendly Korean-inspired dinner.
